articles.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed on Sunday as Tehran casts doubt on timing
articles.description: The US president's comments come as Iran says an exact date has not been decided, but it "will not be tomorrow".

articles.title: Resident doctors cancel strike after new offer from government
articles.description: The walkout had been due to start at 07:00 BST on Monday and last until Friday.

articles.title: Molly Russell's dad says PM rushing social media restrictions 'deplorable'
articles.description: Father of a teenager who took her own life after viewing harmful content says plans appear to have been brought forward for a "political reason".

articles.title: Thousands gather for anti-racism rally in Belfast after disorder
articles.description: Protesters gathered at Belfast City Hall for a demonstration against racism, after the past week of violence and disorder.
